task_completion.description: Verify that the OpenICE application is open and running.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the OpenICE application GUI window visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: Verify that the 'Multiparameter Monitor' (Simulated) is selected or active.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a device panel, tab, or list item labeled 'Multiparameter Monitor' (Simulated) being accessed within the OpenICE interface.

task_completion.description: Verify that the Systolic Blood Pressure is configured to a critical hypotension level.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Systolic Blood Pressure value on the Multiparameter Monitor set to 90 mmHg or lower.

task_completion.description: Verify that the 'Infusion Pump' (Simulated) is selected or active.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a device panel, tab, or list item labeled 'Infusion Pump' (Simulated) being accessed within the OpenICE interface.

task_completion.description: Verify that the Infusion Pump Flow Rate is configured to a bolus level.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Flow Rate value on the Infusion Pump set to 500 mL/hr or higher.

task_completion.description: Verify that the drill log file was created and populated with the required information.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a text editor or terminal showing the file '/home/ga/Desktop/hypotension_drill_log.txt' containing a recorded time, the configured BP value, and the configured flow rate.

task_completion.description: Verify that the agent captured a screenshot of the OpenICE screen.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a terminal command executing a screenshot utility (e.g., scrot, gnome-screenshot) or a saved image file of the OpenICE interface being viewed.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent actually interacted with the OpenICE graphical interface to set the values.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for cursor movements, clicks, or active window focus on the OpenICE application, rather than just terminal commands attempting to bypass the UI.

integrity.description: Verify that the values recorded in the log file match the actual values set in the application.
integrity.visual_evidence: Ensure the BP and flow rate values typed into the text log exactly match the numbers visible on the OpenICE simulated devices in the screenshots.

integrity.description: Verify that the OpenICE application is genuinely running.
integrity.visual_evidence: Ensure the OpenICE interface is a real application window and not a static image opened in an image viewer to spoof the final state.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target critical Systolic Blood Pressure must be 90 mmHg or lower. The target Infusion Pump Flow Rate must be 500 mL/hr or higher. The log file must be exactly located at /home/ga/Desktop/hypotension_drill_log.txt.
